languages.text: "Лорд-капитан, разрешите обратиться. Зарков выковывает стойких и умелых бойцов, привыкших полагаться лишь на себя. Если они просят о помощи — значит, ситуация вышла из-под контроля".

"Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан, разрешите обратиться. Зарков выковывает стойких и умелых бойцов, привыкших полагаться лишь на себя. Если они просят о помощи — значит, ситуация вышла из-под контроля".

"Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

"Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control." {n}After a pause, Dunawski adds more softly,{/n} "Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, do not abandon us again."

"Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

"Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

languages.text: 「艦長様、お許し頂ければ…ザルコフは、自力で生き延びることを教えた、硬く、熟練した戦士たちを鍛え上げた。彼らが助けを求めるということは、状況が手に負えなくなっているということだ。」{n}しばらく沈黙した後、ドゥナウスキーは柔らかく付け加えた。{/n}「どうか、艦長様、二度と私たちを捨てないでください」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control." {n}After a pause, Dunawski adds more softly,{/n} "Please, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, do not abandon us again."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan, konuşmama izin verirseniz... Zarkov, sadece kendilerine güvenmeye alışkın sert, becerikli savaşçılar yetiştirdi. Yardım istiyorlarsa durum kontrolden çıkmış demektir."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan, konuşmama izin verirseniz... Zarkov, sadece kendilerine güvenmeye alışkın sert, becerikli savaşçılar yetiştirdi. Yardım istiyorlarsa durum kontrolden çıkmış demektir."

languages.text: “舰长大人，请容我一言。扎尔科夫锻造了坚韧善战的勇士，他们向来只依靠自己。若连他们都开口求援，那说明局势已经彻底失控。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，请容我一言。扎尔科夫锻造了坚韧善战的勇士，他们向来只依靠自己。若连他们都开口求援，那说明局势已经彻底失控。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain, wenn Ihr mir erlaubt, zu sprechen – Zarkov hat kampferprobte Kämpfer geformt, die es gewohnt sind, sich nur auf sich selbst zu verlassen. Wenn sie um Hilfe bitten, ist die Situation außer Kontrolle."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain, wenn Ihr mir erlaubt, zu sprechen – Zarkov hat kampferprobte Kämpfer geformt, die es gewohnt sind, sich nur auf sich selbst zu verlassen. Wenn sie um Hilfe bitten, ist die Situation außer Kontrolle."

languages.text: « Avec votre permission, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... Je tiens à préciser que Zarkov a enfanté des générations de combattants émérites habitués à ne compter que sur eux-mêmes. S'ils font appel à vous, c'est que la situation est hors de contrôle. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."

traits.locale_text: « Avec votre permission, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}... Je tiens à préciser que Zarkov a enfanté des générations de combattants émérites habitués à ne compter que sur eux-mêmes. S'ils font appel à vous, c'est que la situation est hors de contrôle. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán, si me concede la palabra: Zarkov ha forjado guerreros veteranos y habilidosos que están acostumbrados a depender solo de sí mismos. Si nos piden ayuda, significa que la situación está fuera de control».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain, if I have your leave to speak — Zarkov has forged hardened, skilled fighters who are used to relying only on themselves. If they are asking for help, it means the situation is out of control."
